trending_videos.title: Clayface | Official Trailer
trending_videos.description:
Meet the new face of Gotham. #ClayfaceMovie only in theaters October 23.

DC Studios’ “Clayface” is a horror thriller from director James Watkins, starring Tom Rhys Harries in the title role of the cult favorite villain from Gotham’s rogues gallery.

Matt Hagen’s meteoric rise from Gotham street kid to Hollywood leading man is tragically cut short when a local crime boss’s actions leave him horribly disfigured. Abandoned by his team and with nothing left, Matt seeks out a cutting edge treatment that miraculously returns him to his former self… but also unexpectedly affects his grip on reality, spiraling him down a destructive path of all-consuming revenge.

The film also stars Naomi Ackie, David Dencik, Max Minghella and Eddie Marsan, as well as Nancy Carroll and Joshua James.

James Watkins directs from a screenplay by Mike Flanagan and Hossein Amini, story by Flanagan, based on characters from DC. The film is produced by Matt Reeves, Lynn Harris, James Gunn and Peter Safran, with Mic

The new trailer for Avengers: Doomsday is LOADED with Easter eggs to the Marvel Cinematic Universe. And, to be honest, we missed a few in our first video. trending_videos.title: Other Mommy | Official Trailer
trending_videos.description:
Your mommy won’t save you. Other Mommy only in theaters October 9.

Can I go inside your heart?

From James Wan, one of the most influential architects of modern horror behind the Saw, Insidious and The Conjuring franchises—and Rob Savage, the director of bold genre films Host and The Boogeyman, comes a terrifying trip into the darkening world of a young girl, Bela, who forms a relationship with a sinister entity in her home who looks uncannily like her own mother.

Academy Award® winner Jessica Chastain (It Chapter Two, The Eyes of Tammy Faye) stars in a dual role as Bela’s mother and as “Other Mommy,” a manifestation of the entity. Jay Duplass (Transparent, Industry) plays Daddo, Bela’s father, and Arabella Olivia Clark (The Housemaid, The Hand that Rocks the Cradle) plays Bela. 

The impressive supporting cast includes Actor Award nominee Dichen Lachman (Severance), Emmy and Tony Award nominee Arian Moayed (Succession) and screen legend Karen Allen (Indiana Jones films).  

From Blu

genres.description: With titles like 'Clayface | Official Trailer', 'Avengers: Doomsday | Official Trailer', and 'Other Mommy | Official Trailer', trailers constitute a significant portion of trending content.
genres.insights: Trailers for upcoming releases, especially those related to popular franchises (e.g., Marvel, DC), are highly popular and likely to trend.
genres.opportunities: Create content that breaks down trailers, highlights Easter eggs, and discusses fan theories to capture audience interest.

genres.insights: Gaming content, especially full gameplays and unique Minecraft experiences, remains a popular trend.
